heading: Eligibility for veterans benefits and other rights, privileges, immunities, and benefits under certain provisions of law
label: 3072 Eligibility for veterans benefits and other rights, privileges, immunities, and benefits under certain provisions of law
notes: References in TextThe Servicemembers Civil Relief Act, referred to in subsec. (a)(2), is , , which is classified principally to chapter 50 (§ 3901 et seq.) of Title 50, War and National Defense. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.act Oct. 17, 1940, ch. 88854 Stat. 1178
Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 857 and 857–3(a) of this title prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 107–372

Amendments2003—Subsec. (a)(2). amended par. (2) generally substituting “The Servicemembers Civil Relief Act” for “The Soldiers’ and Sailors’ Civil Relief Act of 1940 (50 App. U.S.C. 501 et seq.)”.Pub. L. 108–189

children.text: Laws administered by the Secretary of Veterans Affairs.
The Servicemembers Civil Relief Act [ et seq.].50 U.S.C. 3901
, as in effect before .Section 410 of title 42September 1, 1950

children.heading: Exercise of authority
children.label: b Exercise of authority
children.text: In the administration of the laws and regulations referred to in subsection (a), with respect to the Administration, the authority vested in the Secretary of Defense and the Secretaries of the military departments and their respective departments shall be exercised by the Secretary of Commerce.
